calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-04-2012 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-20-2012 Continued To Dec-19-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance nor objection. Court ordered case dismissed as to defendants Chan Duong and DOES 1 to 100. The Court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substantial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. The court finds a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Proceedings not reported. (610)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Aug-08-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. BRADLEY A. RUSSI, DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY, TEL. NO. 554-3964 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is Granted. No opposition filed. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR # 5976 =(302/EHG)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-18-2012 Continued To Sep-18-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff is sanctioned $500.00 for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 9/18/2012 at 2:00 PM in Department 610. Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-15-2012 Continued To Jul-17-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff is sanctioned $350.00 for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 7/17/2012 at 2:00 PM in Department 610. Proceedings not reported. (610)

Notice Of Motion For Order Establishing Admissions
Off Calendar May-02-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Bradley A. Russi, Esq., Deputy City Attorney, Tel. 415.554.3964, appearing for the defendant and moving party.
Lucia Magante, Tel. 415.933.2501, plaintiff appearing on her own behalf with Lolita Cruz, non party/translator.

The matter was argued. The court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's Motion For Order Establishing Admissions is granted. No opposition filed and plaintiff never responded to Defendant City and County of San Francisco's First Requests for Admission (Set One). The truth of any matters specified in the City and County of San Francisco's First Requests for Admission (Set One) is deemed admitted. Order signed in open court. Pro Tem Judge: Ernst Halperin, not reported

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-16-2012 Set For Order To Show Cause On May-14-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610
